name: rox-transcribe-worker
description: Live Transcript Phase-2: the SERVER-SIDE streaming transcription worker. Joins an org-scoped LiveKit voice room as a hidden participant, subscribes to the audio tracks, streams PCM to Deepgram realtime (@deepgram/sdk listen.v1), and on each FINAL transcript event emits a segment back to the room through the EXISTING Phase-1 fan-out (publishData under `rox.live.transcript`, the SAME envelope `reduceTranscript` already merges) and persists finals via a signed POST. STANDALONE — NOT part of the Rox bun/turbo workspace; runnable code ships here. A LIVE sub-second transcript needs this process DEPLOYED + DEEPGRAM_API_KEY provisioned + the existing LiveKit server creds (deploy follow-up, OUTSIDE CI). DO NOT auto-deploy. live.transcript stays ready via Phase-1; this is the streaming UPGRADE, not a new flag.
